---
title: "Hidden Universe IMAX 3D "
date: 2013-06-16
author: Jonathan Whitmore
draft: true
categories: []
---

I've been involved ([http://hiddenuniversemovie.com/the-film/the-astronomers/](http://hiddenuniversemovie.com/the-film/the-astronomers/)) with the production of a 3D IMAX film called Hidden Universe.
{{< video http://www.youtube.com/embed/0yap2gSYTlM >}}
The locations it'll be showing (so far) are here: [http://hiddenuniversemovie.com/theatre-locations/](http://hiddenuniversemovie.com/theatre-locations/)

Some photos that I took of the filming in [Chile](http://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Chile) (back in November 2012).



[![](https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/-apl8Uy-tEPU/ULoCMjIfB3E/AAAAAAAAC_Q/S4NOycTLRwI/s160-c/201211IMAX.jpg)](https://picasaweb.google.com/111973479290948291396/201211IMAX?authuser=0&feat=embedwebsite)


[2012-11 IMAX](https://picasaweb.google.com/111973479290948291396/201211IMAX?authuser=0&feat=embedwebsite)



 
[![Enhanced by Zemanta](http://img.zemanta.com/zemified_e.png?x-id=fff3d4da-4b66-444d-afd8-46dbd826e68f)](http://www.zemanta.com/?px)
